---
title: "Contact"
---
<style>
body {
  background-image: url('images/background.jpg');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}
</style>

## Get in Touch

I'm always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and conversations. Feel free to reach out through any of the channels below.

## Contact Details

- {{< fa envelope >}} **Email:** [woohollenhorst@gmail.com](mailto:woohollenhorst@gmail.com)
- {{< fa brands linkedin >}} **LinkedIn:** [Woo-Sung Hollenhorst](https://www.linkedin.com/in/woo-sung-hollenhorst-b05386220/)
- {{< fa brands github >}} **GitHub:** [woosunghollenhorst](https://github.com/woosunghollenhorst)

## Location

Currently based in Dublin, Ireland. Open to opportunities across the EU.
